title: Lifecycle documents
description: Each phase's reports as buttons: click one and the agent writes it from the programme's own record.

steps.title: The reports this phase produces
steps.voiceScript: Each of the six phases lists the reports it produces. Every one is a button.
steps.captionText: Each of the six phases lists the reports it produces. Every one is a button.
steps.fallbackMessage: The reports this phase produces: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Click the report you want
steps.description: One click, and the agent writes it.
steps.voiceScript: Click a report and the agent writes it from the programme's own record. There is nothing to tick.
steps.captionText: Click a report and the agent writes it from the programme's own record. There is nothing to tick.
steps.fallbackMessage: Click the report you want: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Give it a source, if you have one
steps.description: Optional: a document of your own for it to draw on.
steps.voiceScript: You can point it at a document you have already uploaded. What it writes comes from the programme's own record -- it is not invented, and where it lacks a fact it says so.
steps.captionText: You can point it at a document you have already uploaded. What it writes comes from the programme's own record -- it is not invented, and where it lacks a fact it says so.
steps.fallbackMessage: Give it a source, if you have one: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Generate it
steps.description: Downloadable, and attached to the programme.
steps.voiceScript: Generate it, and it is attached to the programme and downloadable.
steps.captionText: Generate it, and it is attached to the programme and downloadable.
steps.fallbackMessage: Generate it: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the write-up
steps.description: Every generated document has a report page.
steps.voiceScript: Every document you generate has a report page. Open it from the register.
steps.captionText: Every document you generate has a report page. Open it from the register.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the write-up: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Read it, print it, send it
steps.description: The same report component as a project design.
steps.voiceScript: Read it on the page, print it, download it as a PDF, or email it to the people who need it -- the same report component the project design uses.
steps.captionText: Read it on the page, print it, download it as a PDF, or email it to the people who need it -- the same report component the project design uses.
steps.fallbackMessage: Read it, print it, send it: not visible on this screen yet.
